NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (PLAINTIFF & DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,454.08 FILED BY LOKHANDWALA, CHARMIL MEHTA, SAMARTH RAMESH, RENJINI AS TO DEFENDANT DALY, URSULA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-22-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOKHANDWALA, CHARMIL MEHTA, SAMARTH RAMESH, RENJINI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DALY, URSULA $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,050.00, CONSIDERING DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE AND ORAL EVIDENCE BY BOTH SIDES THE COURT FINDS 1) DEFENDANT LANDLORD DALY FAILED TO COMPLY CC 1950.5 21 DAYS PROVISION ET AL. RE SECURITY DEPOSIT RETURN 2) CHARGES FOR REPAIRS EG. SINK REPLACEMENT BLINDS AND WINDOWS THAT WERE MORE THAN 14 YEARS OLD WERE UNREASONABLE. RETURN IN BAD FAITH. HENCE $10,000 (3454.08 + DOUBLE) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF FEB-16-2023 - ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIM APPEALS ON FEB-16-2023 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 502, JUDGE JEFFREY S. ROSS. (206)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF FEB-16-2023 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. URSULA DALY OWES CHARMIL LOKHANDWALA ET AL. $4339.06. (SEE SCANNED JUDGMENT FOR FULL DETAILS). THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF DEC-23-2022. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Feb-16-2023 Set For Trial On Feb-16-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 502

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-16-2023 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: (In-person)
Charmil Lokhandwala, 408-386-4855, Plaintiff/Respondent
Samarth Mehta, 408-386-3261, Plaintiff/Respondent
Renjini Ramesh, 415-926-2976, Plaintiff/Respondent
Ursula Daly, 415-490-7060, Defendant/Appellant

The above-entitled cause comes on calendar for a trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Plaintiff and Defendant present opening arguments. Plaintiffs testify and argue. Plaintiffs submit a binder of exhibits tabbed 1-12 which consists of lists and photos.

Defendant responds, testifies and argues. Defendant submits a stack of documents tagged as Defendant's exhibits A-P which consist of lists, invoices and photos.

Both parties present additional arguments.
Plaintiffs' exhibits from 12/22/22 hearing are returned to the parties.
Plaintiffs and Defendant's new exhibits are retained by the Court.

The matter is taken under submission. The Court informs the parties a Judgement will be sent out within the week.

Judge: Jeffrey S. Ross, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (502/jsr)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-16-2023 Continued To Feb-16-23 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-27-2022 Judgment Entered
